title: A Man Young And Old:- The Mermaid
content:
A mermaid found a swimming lad,
Picked him for her own,
Pressed her body to his body,
Laughed; and plunging down
Forgot in cruel happiness
That even lovers drown.
meaning:
"A Man Young And Old:- The Mermaid" is a quintessential example of William Butler Yeats's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
